# Anaemia {#sec-anaemia}

Anaemia is classified by mean cell volume (MCV) into microcytic, normocytic and
macrocytic categories.

```{r}
#| label: fig-mcv
#| fig-cap: "Illustrative distribution of MCV in a mixed clinic population."
#| echo: false
set.seed(1)
mcv <- c(rnorm(120, 72, 5), rnorm(200, 90, 6), rnorm(80, 104, 5))
hist(mcv, breaks = 30, col = "#B71C1C", border = "white",
     main = "", xlab = "MCV (fL)")
abline(v = c(80, 100), lty = 2, col = "grey30")
```

@fig-mcv shows the three classes separated at 80 and 100 fL. Management of
iron-deficiency anaemia and the wider evidence base are reviewed elsewhere
[@example2025method].
